ഈ വീഡിയോയിൽ, വീട്ടിൽ തന്നെ ഏറ്റവും മികച്ച ലസാഗ്ന ഉണ്ടാക്കാൻ നിങ്ങൾ അറിയേണ്ടതെല്ലാം ഞാൻ നിങ്ങൾക്ക് കാണിച്ചുതരാം. ചില കാരണങ്ങളാൽ വീട്ടിൽ തന്നെ ഉണ്ടാക്കുന്നതാണ് നല്ലതെന്ന് ഞാൻ കരുതുന്ന ഒരു വിഭവമാണിത്.

Visita https://squarespace.com/andycooks para obtener un 10 % de descuento en tu primera compra de un sitio web o dominio con ANDYCOOKS.

En este video te explicaré todo lo que necesitas saber para preparar la lasaña perfecta en casa. Creo que es un plato que se disfruta mejor en casa por varias razones.

RECETA: https://www.andy-cooks.com/blogs/recipes/lasagne

MIS PRODUCTOS: https://bit.ly/AndyCooksEssentials
MI LIBRO DE COCINA: https://bit.ly/3WVoXAN

Sitio web con todas mis recetas: www.andy-cooks.com/

selection.backlogTitle: Cookies & Cream New York Cookies Recipe | Cupcake Jemma

snippet.title: Cookies & Cream New York Cookies Recipe | Cupcake Jemma
snippet.description:
Order delicious NY Cookies for UK wide delivery here 👉🏼 https://www.crumbsanddoilies.co.uk/collections/cookies
CAKES: http://www.crumbsanddoilies.co.uk 
INSTAGRAM: @cupcakejemma 
CAKESTAGRAM: @crumbsanddoilies

Ever since we put this cookie in our London Soho Bakery, you guys have been salivating for it. It's finally here! A dark double chocolate chip cookie, laced with Oreo crumble, white chocolate chips, 54% chocolate chips, filled with a molten creamy white chocolate filling. We love these cookies because they're thick, ooey, gooey and that perfect balance between a crisp outer and a dense, soft, almost underbaked centre. 

Our Cookie & Cream Cookies will be in store all this week, so come by and grab one, or a few! 

C&D Soho:
1 Kingly Court, 
Carnaby 
W1B 5PW

INGREDIENTS:

12 tbsp White Chocolate Spread
230g Cold, Chopped Butter
160g Light Brown Sugar
160g Caster Sugar
300g White Chocolate Chips
100g Dark Chocolate Chips 
50g Crushed Oreo Crumbs 
300g Plain Flour
130g Self Raising Flour 
70g Black Cocoa Powder 
1 tsp Sea Salt
2 tsp Baking Powder
2 Eggs
1 Egg Yolk
50g Crushed Oreo Cookies for Rolling
Makes 12 Cookies

-----------
Become a Patreon BAKE CLUB member for a pdf download of this and other recipes, as well as Bake-Alongs, extra content, baking tips and more.

BAKE CLUB: http://patreon.com/cupcakejemma
BAKE AT HOME: http://cupcakejemma.com

selection.backlogTitle: Super Cute Bento Cakes | Full Baking Recipe and Decorating Tutorial | Cupcake Jemma

snippet.title: Super Cute Bento Cakes | Full Baking Recipe and Decorating Tutorial | Cupcake Jemma
snippet.description:
Order Cakes & Cupcakes for Delivery and Collection just here https://www.crumbsanddoilies.co.uk/collections/cakes
https://www.crumbsanddoilies.co.uk/collections/cupcakes

Oh my gaaaaad, are these not the cutest little cakes you ever did see?! Sally & Jemma called first dibs to bake in the new studio space and they did not come to play - they're bringing you these beautiful Bento cakes! Don't forget to use the hashtag #cupcakejemma when you recreate these over on Instagram and tag us in your snaps! 

How do you like the new studio? Check out the full reveal tour here: https://youtu.be/dHtCGIOt0oc

You're gunna need some burger boxes for these cutie pies - we just had a search online to find the ones we like the look of most. 

You can get all the equipment we used PLUS sprinkles over at http://cupcakejemma.com 

For some piping tutorials check this video out: 
Piped buttercream cake masterclass: https://youtu.be/vNYeAEHk-Bo

Make your own Self Raising Flour: https://youtu.be/6rCrGw0_lGU
----------------------------------

For the sponges: 
2 9x13 (Note Sally said the wrong size, soz!!)
Preheat oven to 175C fan assisted (195C non fan)
250g Unsalted Butter
250g Caster Sugar
4 Eggs
250g SR Flour
3tbsp Milk
1/2 tsp Vanilla

For the Vanilla Buttercream:
250g Unsalted Butter
400g Icing Sugar
3-4tbsp Milk
1/2 tsp Vanilla
Pinch of Salt

JOIN THE BAKE CLUB FOR FULL DOWNLOADS: http://patreon.com/cupcakejemma.com
BAKE AT HOME KITS & MERCH: http://cupcakejemma.com 
CAKES & COOKIES: http://www.crumbsanddoilies.co.uk 
INSTAGRAM: @cupcakejemma 
CAKESTAGRAM: @crumbsanddoilies

selection.backlogTitle: Classic Coffee & Walnut Layer Cake Recipe | Cupcake Jemma

snippet.title: Classic Coffee & Walnut Layer Cake Recipe | Cupcake Jemma
snippet.description:
How we have gone this long without sharing this classic recipe for Coffee & Walnut cake we don't quite know! But alas, here it is in all its perfectly simple glory; layers of coffee and walnut sponge filled and decorated with coffee buttercream and topped off with more walnuts. This is a perfect tea time cake and we guarantee you will absolutely love it. 

Let us know how you get on and what you're baking by tagging us in your Instagram posts using #cupcakejemma 

And to join our awesome Bake Club where you can find extra content, exclusive behind the scenes and beautiful downloadable pdf's of all the recipes we put here on YouTube head to: 
https://www.patreon.com/cupcakejemma

-------------------------
Preheat Oven to 170C fan assisted (190C non fan) 
For the 3 layer 7" cake that Sally makes in the video:
This quantity will also work for 2 x 8" sponge, see below for 6"

250g Softened Unsalted Butter
250g Caster Sugar
4 Eggs 
250g Self Raising Flour 
50g Chopped Walnuts 
3tbsp cold good quality Espresso (or 1tbsp instant coffee granules mixed with 3tbsp water)
 
Coffee Buttercream: 
250g softened Unsalted Butter 
400g Icing Sugar 
3-4 tbsp cold good quality Espresso (or 1tbsp instant coffee granules mixed with 4tbsp water)

Walnuts to decorate!
--------------------------
For 2 layers of 6" sponge: 
125g Softened Unsalted Butter
125g Caster Sugar
2 Eggs 
125g Self Raising Flour 
25g Chopped Walnuts 
1.5tbsp cold good quality Espresso (or 0.5tbsp instant coffee granules mixed with 1.5tbsp water)
 
Coffee Buttercream: 
125g softened Unsalted Butter 
200g Icing Sugar 
1-2 tbsp cold good quality Espresso (or 1/2tbsp instant coffee granules mixed with 2tbsp water)
----------------------------

BAKE AT HOME KITS AND MERCH!: http://cupcakejemma.com 
SUBSCRIBE FOR WEEKLY VIDS: https://www.youtube.com/user/CupcakeJemma
MORE CAKE: http://www.crumbsanddoilies.co.uk 
MY INSTAGRAM: @cupcakejemma 
CAKESTAGRAM: @crumbsanddoilies

1-2 tbsp cold good quality Espresso (or 1/2tbsp instant coffee granules mixed with 2tbsp water)
----------------------------

en-GB.title: Classic Coffee & Walnut Layer Cake Recipe | Cupcake Jemma
en-GB.description:
How we have gone this long without sharing this classic recipe for Coffee & Walnut cake we don't quite know! But alas, here it is in all its perfectly simple glory; layers of coffee and walnut sponge filled and decorated with coffee buttercream and topped off with more walnuts. This is a perfect tea time cake and we guarantee you will absolutely love it. 

Let us know how you get on and what you're baking by tagging us in your Instagram posts using #cupcakejemma 

And to join our awesome Bake Club where you can find extra content, exclusive behind the scenes and beautiful downloadable pdf's of all the recipes we put here on YouTube head to: 
https://www.patreon.com/cupcakejemma

-------------------------
Preheat Oven to 170C fan assisted (190C non fan) 
For the 3 layer 7" cake that Sally makes in the video:
This quantity will also work for 2 x 8" sponge, see below for 6"

250g Softened Unsalted Butter
250g Caster Sugar
4 Eggs 
250g Self Raising Flour 
50g Chopped Walnuts 
3tbsp cold good quality Espresso (or 1tbsp instant coffee granules mixed with 3tbsp water)
 
Coffee Buttercream: 
250g softened Unsalted Butter 
400g Icing Sugar 
3-4 tbsp cold good quality Espresso (or 1tbsp instant coffee granules mixed with 4tbsp water)

Walnuts to decorate!
--------------------------
For 2 layers of 6" sponge: 
125g Softened Unsalted Butter
125g Caster Sugar
2 Eggs 
125g Self Raising Flour 
25g Chopped Walnuts 
1.5tbsp cold good quality Espresso (or 0.5tbsp instant coffee granules mixed with 1.5tbsp water)
 
Coffee Buttercream: 
125g softened Unsalted Butter 
200g Icing Sugar 
1-2 tbsp cold good quality Espresso (or 1/2tbsp instant coffee granules mixed with 2tbsp water)
----------------------------

BAKE AT HOME KITS AND MERCH!: http://cupcakejemma.com 
SUBSCRIBE FOR WEEKLY VIDS: https://www.youtube.com/user/CupcakeJemma
MORE CAKE: http://www.crumbsanddoilies.co.uk 
MY INSTAGRAM: @cupcakejemma 
CAKESTAGRAM: @crumbsanddoilies

selection.backlogTitle: Lemon & Cream Cheese Pound Cake Recipe | Cupcake Jemma

snippet.title: Lemon & Cream Cheese Pound Cake Recipe | Cupcake Jemma
snippet.description:
Ok ok so it looks kinda simple but this Lemon and Cream Cheese Pound Cake is pretty life changing! It’s soft, light, tangy, sweet and completely melts in your mouth. There is no need for any icing with cake, it already has it all. 

Join our Bake Club for exclusive recipes, videos, behind the scenes actions as well as downloadable pdfs of all our recipes! 

https://www.patreon.com/cupcakejemma/posts

—————-
Preheat oven to 170C 
After 10 minutes of baking reduce temp to 150C 

290g Soft Butter 
1 Lemon Zest
185g Cream Cheese
415g Caster Sugar
5 Eggs
290g Plain Flour
1/2tsp Baking Powder 
Pinch of Salt
1/2 tsp Vanilla extract 

————-

BAKE AT HOME KITS AND MERCH!: http://cupcakejemma.com 
SUBSCRIBE FOR WEEKLY VIDS: https://www.youtube.com/user/CupcakeJemma
MORE CAKE: http://www.crumbsanddoilies.co.uk 
MY INSTAGRAM: @cupcakejemma 
CAKESTAGRAM: @crumbsanddoilies
